# Revenue Streams

## Revenue Model

| Stream | Description | % of Revenue |
|---|---|---|
| Loan Interest | Interest on loans disbursed | 65% |
| Processing Fees | 1-2% of loan amount | 10% |
| Transaction Fees | Mobile/agent transactions | 8% |
| Insurance Premiums | Member insurance products | 7% |
| Investment Income | Treasury and placements | 5% |
| Training Fees | Financial literacy programmes | 3% |
| Other Income | Miscellaneous | 2% |

## Revenue Projections

| Year | Loan Interest | Fees | Other | Total (KES) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2025 | 2,000,000 | 400,000 | 1,100,000 | 3,500,000 |
| 2026 | 5,000,000 | 900,000 | 1,900,000 | 7,800,000 |
| 2027 | 9,500,000 | 1,800,000 | 2,900,000 | 14,200,000 |

## Cost Structure
- Staff costs: 45%
- Technology: 20%
- Operations: 15%
- Marketing: 10%
- Compliance: 5%
- Contingency: 5%
